text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) National Death Index (NDI) 

VALUES: 001 = Certain infectious and parasitic 
diseases (A00–B99, U071) 

002 = Certain intestinal infectious 
diseases (A00–A08) 

003 = Diarrhea and gastroenteritis of 
infectious origin (A09) 

004 = Tuberculosis (A16–A19) 

005 = Tetanus (A33, A35) 

006 = Diphtheria (A36) 

007 = Whooping cough (A37) 

008 = Meningococcal infection (A39) 

009 = Septicemia (A40–A41) 

010 =
